name: C2xSetSendParameters
title: C2xSetSendParameters
syntax: C2xSetSendParameters(LONG appChannel, LONG txPower, LONG antenna, LONG dataRate, LONG expiry)
description: This method allows to redefine some or all transmission related parameters on the fly; for all following transmissions on a specific VN4610 channel those new default values will be used.
In fact the method overwrites the corresponding internal configuration settings provided by the setup-dialog.
To set just a subset of the parameters the value <-1> can be used for antenna, dataRate and expiry to leave the corresponding parameters of the configuration unchanged.

parameters.name: appChannel
parameters.description: Channel to apply settings to (1 .. n), n = available hardware channels (1=Ath1, 2=Ath2,…)

parameters.name: txPower
parameters.description: Transmission power in dBm; use -100 to keep the original setting.

parameters.name: antenna
parameters.description: Antenna used for Tx: 1: Ant1 2: Ant2 3: both -1: keep the original setting

parameters.name: dataRate
parameters.description: Data rate [Mbps] to be used (use 4 to set 4.5Mbps); Allowed values: 3,4,6,9,12,18,24,27 -1: keep the original setting

parameters.name: expiry
parameters.description: MAC expiry time [µs] 0: never -1: keep the original setting

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
